industry: 教育培训_少儿素质教育

items.hook: 可以先帮你把这一步收窄下来。
items.bridge: 少儿素质教育预约里，先弄清问题、年龄段和时间，比直接回一个能不能约更有用。
items.next_step: Ask for concern, child age, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the parent replies with booking facts.

items.hook: 第一次来先想清楚适不适合，本来就很正常。
items.bridge: 很多第一次接触这类课程的家长，不是需要更多选项，而是需要先知道孩子更适合哪条路线、现在最卡在哪。
items.next_step: Acknowledge the uncertainty and ask what concern matters most plus the time window.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the parent shares route and timing.

items.hook: 我们可以先从你的时间点往回看。
items.bridge: 开学、假期和升年级节点快到时，日期、可来的时段和当前问题，比先讲一大段课程更关键。
items.next_step: Ask when the node is, when the parent can come in, and what they most want to solve.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher once the parent shares timing facts.

items.hook: 我可以先把价格问题变得更有参考性一点。
items.bridge: 这类课程的价格很多时候取决于问题和试听深度，所以先收窄是专注力、表达力、思维还是幼小衔接，会更有帮助。
items.next_step: Ask whether the parent is mainly asking about attention, expression, thinking, or school-readiness.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the parent shares scope.

items.hook: 欢迎你再回来接上这一段。
items.bridge: 对回来的家庭来说，最重要的不是从零重聊，而是先知道这次想接上哪段训练、解决哪个卡点。
items.next_step: Ask what has changed since the last visit and when they hope to come in.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to FollowUp or Catcher depending on the parent's reply.

items.hook: 这类担心可以慢一点说，不用急着给孩子定性。
items.bridge: 有些育儿焦虑在公开评论里看起来轻描淡写，但背后通常是真实的不确定和压力，所以回复要既有帮助又不让人更难堪。
items.next_step: Reply with empathy and lightly invite the parent to share concern and timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the parent continues with details.
